bpWarnings.message: Relation properties [RelationshipType, RelatedTableCardinality, Cardinality] are not set.
Table does not have an alternate key

root_cause_hypothesis:
PRIMARY RESULT: the UNRESOLVED defect behind this regression case is FIXED. add-data-source on a plain (non-extension) form emitted a correct ConDemoDocLine
with ConDemoDocHeader, and the full-model xppc build returned 0 errors - ZERO occurrences of "form datasource ... refers to table '' which does not exist". The recorded baseline (USAGE_EXAMPLES section 1, BUILDS #4-#13) was 58 identical such errors surviving cache wipes, fullBuild+force and Fields-list rewrites, forcing a full sandbox rollback. Both grids and all 4 bound columns were added via add-control including LinesGrid over the second data source. No overwrite=true/xmlContent escape hatch was used; golden matched. DOMINANT RESIDUAL DEFECT - OPTIONAL PARAMETERS ARE SILENTLY DISCARDED across at least three bridge modify ops. Each accepted the parameter, returned success, and omitted it from the emitted XML with no warning: (1) add-relation dropped ALL THREE of relationshipType=Composition, relationCardinality=ZeroMore, relatedTableCardinality=ExactlyOne -- proven by xppbp BPErrorTableRelationshipPropertiesCompleteness naming exactly those three properties; (2) add-data-source dropped linkType=Active (no element), so the case's required ActiveLink join mode is not expressible; (3) add-index dropped allowDuplicates=false and alternateKey=true (observed in the L2-form-modify-controls run in this same session). This is one bug class, not three: the bridge write path maps only required params and ignores the optional ones. SECONDARY GAPS: (a) there is NO operation for table DeleteActions and add-relation has no delete-action parameter, so the case's 'cascading delete action' cannot be expressed through the grounded path at all - RelationshipType=Composition was the closest grounded approximation and it was itself dropped; (b) modify-property rejects FormRef (BPErrorTableMissingFormRef unfixable); (c) the labels tool suggested @RevenueRecognition:ItemName from a label file that is NOT deployed - xppbp reported BPErrorUnknownLabel; this independently reproduces the 'suggests labels from non-deployed label files' half of defect (6) in the 2026-07-21 L4-master-security-slice record (fixed here by switching to @TRX:@TRX1701). NOTE: the case text specifies 'LineNum: integer' but both LineNum and LineNumber EDTs are Real in D365FO; the explicitly named LineNum EDT was used and the column bound as a Real control.
suggested_fix_area: src/bridge MetadataWriteService: stop silently discarding optional parameters - add-relation (relationshipType, cardinality, relatedTableCardinality), add-data-source (linkType), add-index (allowDuplicates, alternateKey); ideally fail loudly or echo back which params were applied. Add a delete-action operation (or an onDelete param on add-relation) for table DeleteActions. Add FormRef to the AxTable modify-property allow-list. labels tool: filter suggestions to label files actually deployed in the environment so xppbp does not report BPErrorUnknownLabel.
